root_text.an5.175:1.1: “Pañcahi, bhikkhave, dhammehi samannāgato upāsako upāsakacaṇḍālo ca hoti upāsakamalañca upāsakapatikuṭṭho ca.
root_text.an5.175:1.5: kotūhalamaṅgaliko hoti, maṅgalaṁ pacceti no kammaṁ;
root_text.an5.175:1.8: Imehi kho, bhikkhave, pañcahi dhammehi samannāgato upāsako upāsakacaṇḍālo ca hoti upāsakamalañca upāsakapatikuṭṭho ca.
root_text.an5.175:2.1: Pañcahi, bhikkhave, dhammehi samannāgato upāsako upāsakaratanañca hoti upāsakapadumañca upāsakapuṇḍarīkañca.
root_text.an5.175:2.5: akotūhalamaṅgaliko hoti, kammaṁ pacceti no maṅgalaṁ;
root_text.an5.175:2.8: Imehi kho, bhikkhave, pañcahi dhammehi samannāgato upāsako upāsakaratanañca hoti upāsakapadumañca upāsakapuṇḍarīkañcā”ti.

translation_text.an5.175:1.1: “Mendicants, a lay follower with five qualities is a corpse-worker, a stain, and a reject among lay followers.
translation_text.an5.175:1.5: They follow boisterous, superstitious rites, believing in omens rather than deeds.
translation_text.an5.175:1.6: They seek outside of the Buddhist community for those worthy of religious donations.
translation_text.an5.175:1.7: And they make offerings there first.
translation_text.an5.175:1.8: A lay follower with these five qualities is a corpse-worker, a stain, and a reject among lay followers.
translation_text.an5.175:2.1: A lay follower with five qualities is a gem, a pink lotus, and a white lotus among lay followers.
translation_text.an5.175:2.5: They don’t practice boisterous, superstitious rites, and believe in deeds rather than omens.
translation_text.an5.175:2.6: They don’t seek outside of the Buddhist community for those worthy of religious donations.
translation_text.an5.175:2.7: And they don’t make offerings there first.
translation_text.an5.175:2.8: A lay follower with these five qualities is a gem, a pink lotus, and a white lotus among lay followers.”

variant_text.an5.175:1.1: upāsakapatikuṭṭho ca → upāsakapatikiṭṭho ca (bj, sya-all, km, pts1ed)
